name: operator namespace folder is preserved across simulated plugin upgrade per the operator contract
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org && printf 'rules:\n  - id: my-org-rule-1\n' > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/simulate-plugin-upgrade.sh" --root generated-code-quality-standards --to-version 2.0.0 2>err.txt && [ -f generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml ] && grep -q 'my-org-rule-1' generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
